name: Arizona Skillet Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and green bell pepper. Cook until softened.
2. Add the minced garlic, chili powder, salt, and cumin. Stir to combine.
3. Cook for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
4. Stir in the canned tomatoes. Use a spoon to break up any lumps.
5. Add the kidney beans and corn. Return the heat to medium-high and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Toss with the elbow macaroni (elbow) until heated through.
